seo.title: Alixan - Products, UI Systems and Startups from Kazakhstan
seo.description: Personal tech ecosystem of Alikhan: products, open-source UI system, portfolio and startup experiments from Kazakhstan.
seo.imageAlt: Alixan - Products, UI systems and startups from Kazakhstan

hero.description: I'm Alikhan, a full-stack engineer and founder building digital products, open-source UI tools and startup experiments.
hero.panelTitle: Products, systems and experiments connected by one founder mindset.
hero.panelText: A single place for product building, interface systems and startup execution.

about.title: A short founder profile, not a resume page.
about.paragraph1: Alikhan is a full-stack developer from Almaty, Kazakhstan with a strong frontend background and a product mindset.
about.paragraph2: I build web, mobile and backend systems using Nuxt, Angular, Flutter, NestJS and MongoDB.
about.paragraph3: His focus is SaaS, marketplaces, UI systems, monetization and startup execution.

skills.title: Skills & expertise.
skills.description: The tools and systems I use to turn ideas into useful products.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Designing user interfaces from concept to production-ready products.
design.stack: Figma, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Prototyping, Design Systems

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Complex interfaces, dashboards and product flows.
frontend.stack: Angular, Vue, Nuxt, React, TypeScript, RxJS

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: APIs, data, deployments and production ownership.
backend.stack: NestJS, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Nginx

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: Cross-platform apps and realtime product scenarios.

experience.title: Experience & product launches.
experience.description: From enterprise systems to founder-led products built from Kazakhstan.

items.summary: Frontend ownership for a utility billing system used by calculation centers.
points: Turned complex billing logic into clear UI

items.summary: Joined two key banking products in a short period: installment payments and lending.
points: Synchronized dev/master branches with more than 700 diverging commits

items.summary: Led frontend work across e-commerce, admin tools and internal warehouse ERP.
points: Delivered a key product in 8 months

products.title: Projects & products.
products.description: A compact collection of products, experiments and systems I have built or am building.

takta.label: Marketplace
takta.title: Takta.kz - classifieds marketplace
takta.description: A Kazakhstan-focused classifieds and services marketplace built from scratch with mobile, web, backend, realtime chat and anti-fraud logic.

ui.label: Open Source
ui.title: Alixan - Alixan UI
ui.description: A personal open-source UI system and ecosystem gateway for building SaaS, e-commerce and product interfaces faster.

wedding.label: Startup Idea
wedding.title: Wedding startup
wedding.description: A new startup idea for organizing weddings and toys in Kazakhstan: guests, budget, invitations and vendor catalog.

freelance.label: Marketplace Experiment
freelance.title: FreelancePlus - freelance marketplace
freelance.description: A freelance marketplace experiment for Kazakhstan with profiles, orders, bids, online payments and market validation.

kks.label: Billing
kks.title: KKS DIGITAL - utility billing system
kks.description: A commercial billing product for utility calculation centers with complex accrual flows, recalculations and stable backend integration.

halyk.label: Banking
halyk.title: Halyk Bank - installment and lending products
halyk.description: Frontend work on key banking products for installment payments and lending, including project stabilization and architectural fixes.

alser.label: E-commerce
alser.title: Alser.kz - e-commerce, admin panel and warehouse ERP
alser.description: Frontend development and leadership across the main electronics store, internal admin tools and warehouse ERP workflows.

institu.label: GovTech
institu.title: Institute of Digital Engineering and Technology - Antikor portal
institu.description: Frontend work on the corporate portal for the Anti-Corruption Agency of Kazakhstan, including HRM, strategy analytics, prevention and structural department modules.

ryware.label: Outsource
ryware.title: Ryware - client product modules
ryware.description: Frontend development for production client products, including technical debt cleanup, performance optimization and new module launches.

buildPublic.title: Building in public.
buildPublic.description: I share the process of building startups, UI systems and products from Kazakhstan: design, code, mistakes, launches and growth.
